webtoons.title: True Beauty
webtoons.description: A girl who transforms herself with makeup navigates high school love, friendship, and self-confidence after years of bullying over her looks.

webtoons.title: See You in My 19th Life
webtoons.description: A woman who has been reincarnated eighteen times retains all her past memories, and in her nineteenth life, she reunites with someone she loved centuries ago.

webtoons.title: Solo Leveling
webtoons.description: The weakest hunter in the world gains a mysterious system that lets him level up infinitely, transforming him into the most powerful being alive.

webtoons.title: My ID is Gangnam Beauty
webtoons.description: A college student who underwent plastic surgery to escape years of bullying must face new judgment and unexpected love as she starts university life.

webtoons.title: Unordinary
webtoons.description: In a world where everyone has superpowers, one powerless boy hides his true abilities while navigating a brutal high school social hierarchy.

webtoons.title: Business Proposal
webtoons.description: A woman takes her friend's place on a blind date as a favor, only to discover the date is actually her company's CEO in disguise.

webtoons.title: Yumi's Cells
webtoons.description: A woman's inner thoughts and emotions are portrayed as animated cells living inside her brain, blending live action with animation to explore love and life.
webtoons.famousFor: K-Drama Adaptation Mixing Live Action and Animation (2021)

webtoons.title: Extraordinary You
webtoons.description: A high schooler discovers she's a side character in a fantasy comic destined for a tragic fate, and decides to rewrite her own story.

webtoons.title: All of Us Are Dead
webtoons.description: A high school becomes ground zero for a zombie outbreak, trapping students who must fight to survive while help struggles to reach them.

webtoons.title: What's Wrong with Secretary Kim
webtoons.description: A devoted secretary decides to resign after nine years, sending her narcissistic vice-chairman boss into a panic as he realizes his true feelings for her.

webtoons.title: Down to Earth
webtoons.description: A spoiled rich girl loses everything and is forced to learn humility, hard work, and genuine love while living among ordinary people.

webtoons.title: Purple Hyacinth
webtoons.description: A detective with the ability to detect lies teams up with an infamous assassin to uncover the truth behind a series of murders.

webtoons.title: Nano Machine
webtoons.description: A young warrior's life changes forever when advanced nanotechnology from the future is implanted into his body.

webtoons.title: Dr. Frost
webtoons.description: A brilliant psychologist with exceptional observation skills helps solve complex cases while learning about human emotions.

webtoons.title: Hellbound
webtoons.description: Supernatural beings appear without warning to violently drag people to hell, sparking chaos, fear, and a new religious movement.
